com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXLanguageMgr


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXLanguageMgr
    Interface to access language manager

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXLanguage> getAvailableLanguages()
      Gives all available languages in the dictionary.
      IXLanguage getLanguage(java.lang.String languageCode)
      Gives the X language for the supplied language code.
      IXLanguageMgrSetter getLanguageMgrSetter()
      Used if you need to edit the system's language manager, for example to add a new language to the system.

    • Method Detail

      • getLanguageMgrSetter

        IXLanguageMgrSetter getLanguageMgrSetter()
        Used if you need to edit the system's language manager, for example to add a new language to the system. This method returns an 'IXLanguageMgrSetter' that will store numerous changes to be applied. You should note that this method will return null if you are not allowed to edit system's language manager in a particular situation. Also it will fail and return null if user doesn't have ImportLanguageDictionary functional permission.
        Returns:
        IXLanguageMgrSetter that stores the changes to be applied when the IXAction.execute() method completes. It will return null if you are not allowed to edit system's language manager. You should check for a null return value.

      • getLanguage

        IXLanguage getLanguage(java.lang.String languageCode)
        Gives the X language for the supplied language code.
        Parameters:
        languageCode - - language code for which X representation is needed.
        Returns:
        IXLanguage representing the supplied language code.

      • getAvailableLanguages

        java.util.Set<IXLanguage> getAvailableLanguages()
        Gives all available languages in the dictionary.
        Returns:
        set of all available languages in the dictionary.
